data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a re-sign requirement when the waiver language changes, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any implementation or checks related to versioned waivers or the re-signing process. This leads to a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of re-signing requirement being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for re-signing requirement
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-sign requirement when form version changes.
